# ViteLoop

> ViteLoop provides enterprise software for organizations building private CDN platforms, media infrastructure, edge networks, and cloud-native services — deployed in your own environment with complete ownership and control.

ViteLoop is infrastructure software, not infrastructure services. Every product shares one control plane, one API surface, and one deployment model, and runs on bare metal, any cloud, or on-premises — including air-gapped and sovereign environments. The platform is API-first and Kubernetes-native, with SSO, RBAC, and OpenTelemetry.

## Products

- [ViteLoop CDN](https://www.viteloop.com/products/cdn): Global content delivery network — Anycast edge caching, HTTP/3, TLS, instant purge, and real-time analytics for video, software downloads, websites, and large files.
- [ViteLoop Stream](https://www.viteloop.com/products/stream): Complete VOD and low-latency live streaming software with adaptive bitrate, captions, and per-title analytics.
- [ViteLoop Transcoder](https://www.viteloop.com/products/transcoder): Distributed, AI-driven video transcoding across GPU and CPU pipelines (AV1, HEVC, H.264, VP9) with VMAF quality scoring.
- [ViteLoop DRM](https://www.viteloop.com/products/drm): Multi-DRM content protection and license management (Widevine, FairPlay, PlayReady) with a self-hosted license server and forensic watermarking.
- [ViteLoop OTT](https://www.viteloop.com/products/ott): Turnkey OTT streaming platform with web, mobile, and smart-TV apps, multi-DRM, and SVOD/TVOD/AVOD monetization.
- [ViteLoop LMS](https://www.viteloop.com/products/lms): Video-first learning platform with DRM-protected video, courses, assessments, and completion tracking (SCORM, xAPI, SSO).

## Platform

- [Products overview](https://www.viteloop.com/products): The building blocks of your infrastructure — run the whole platform or a single component.
- [Solutions](https://www.viteloop.com/solutions): Built for hosting providers, ISPs, telecoms, enterprises, governments, and streaming platforms.
- [Developers](https://www.viteloop.com/developers): API-first platform with SDKs, a REST API, webhooks, and a CLI.
- [Documentation](https://www.viteloop.com/docs): Guides, references, and API docs for deploying and operating ViteLoop.
- [Status](https://www.viteloop.com/status): Operational status of ViteLoop's reference services.
